title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz General

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz General
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz General in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz General:
Bajaj Allianz General is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
